opennlp.tools.ml.libsvm.doccat.SvmDoccatModel

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static SvmDoccatModel
    SvmDoccatModel.deserialize(InputStream in)
    Deserializes a SvmDoccatModel from the given InputStream using default resource limits.
    static SvmDoccatModel
    SvmDoccatModel.deserialize(InputStream in, SvmDoccatModel.DeserializationLimits limits)
    Deserializes a SvmDoccatModel from the given InputStream using the supplied resource limits.
    static SvmDoccatModel
    DocumentCategorizerSVM.train(String lang, opennlp.tools.util.ObjectStream<opennlp.tools.doccat.DocumentSample> samples, opennlp.tools.doccat.FeatureGenerator... featureGenerators)
    Trains an SVM-based document categorization model using default configuration (TF-IDF weighting, no feature selection, scaling to [0, 1]).
    static SvmDoccatModel
    DocumentCategorizerSVM.train(String lang, opennlp.tools.util.ObjectStream<opennlp.tools.doccat.DocumentSample> samples, SvmDoccatConfiguration config, opennlp.tools.doccat.FeatureGenerator... featureGenerators)
    Trains an SVM-based document categorization model with a custom configuration.

    Modifier

    Description
     
    DocumentCategorizerSVM(SvmDoccatModel model, opennlp.tools.doccat.FeatureGenerator... featureGenerators)
    Instantiates a DocumentCategorizerSVM with a trained model and feature generators.
